ocr_findings.description: Lesson header graphic ('Lesson 00-02' badge with icon) rendered as plain text 'Lesson 00-02' without the visual badge styling — acceptable for OCR.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 00-02 page covering exam syllabus (シラバス) and question categories. Two tables (分野の説明 and 分野ごとの出題内容) are well-structured in OCR with correct headers and multi-line cell content. URL citation for IPA syllabus PDF is preserved. Body text below tables matches image accurately.
